description.en: When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, Passion +10; HR contacting speed +10% (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, all Siracusa Operators assigned to Trading Posts gain order acquisition efficiency +5%

When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, clue collection speed +4% for each Minos Operator in the Base (excluding Assistants and Activity Room users, caps at +20%, strongest effect of the same type applies); when assigned together with Sargon Operators, self Morale loss per hour +0.02

When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, clue collection speed +5% for each Minos Operator in the Base (excluding Assistants and Activity Room users, caps at +25%, strongest effect of the same type applies); when assigned together with Sargon Operators, self Morale loss per hour +0.02
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, increases Morale of all Operators in the Control Center by +0.05 per hour.
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, all Elite Operators in Dormitories recover +0.1 Morale per hour (strongest effect of the same type applies)

When this Operator is assigned to a Factory, the productivity contributed by all other Operators in that Factory becomes 0 (excluding productivity granted based on facility count), but every Operator in that Factory increases that Factory's Capacity limit by +5

When this Operator is assigned to a Factory, the productivity contributed by all other Operators in that Factory becomes 0 (excluding productivity granted based on facility count), but every Operator in that Factory increases that Factory's Productivity by +10% and Capacity limit by +5
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, the productivity of Precious Metals of all Factories +0.5%, with an additional +0.5% for every 20 Passion
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, the productivity of Precious Metals of all Factories +1%, with an additional +1% for every 20 Passion
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, self Morale loss per hour +0.05 when Passion is 40 or higher
When this Operator is assigned to a Trading Post, other Operators working in the Trading Post have +10% order acquisition efficiency
When this Operator is assigned to a Trading Post, other Operators working in the Trading Post have +20% order acquisition efficiency
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, all Trading Posts with 3 Kjerag Operators assigned gain order acquisition efficiency +10%
When this Operator is assigned to a Factory, for each Rhine Lab Operator in the Base (excluding Assistants and Activity Room users, caps at 5), Precious Metal productivity +3%

When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, Passion +20; for every 8 Passion, self Morale consumed per hour +0.01 and all Trading Posts' order efficiency +1% (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center with Sakiko Togawa, ignores the self Morale loss effect from her own base skill
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, for every Operator in the Dormitories, Passion +1.

When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, all Operators in Dormitories recover +0.05 Morale per hour (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place); when assigned to the Control Center with Sakiko Togawa, Morale consumed per hour by Sakiko Togawa +0.1
When this Operator is assigned to a Power Plant, increases the drone recovery rate by +10%
When this Operator is assigned to the Reception Room, increases the likelihood of obtaining clues that are not on the Clue Board.
When this Operator is assigned to a Factory, gain +5 Storage Capacity for each Rhine Tech-type skill in that Factory
When this Operator is assigned to a Dormitory, restores +0.15 Morale per hour to all Operators assigned to that Dormitory (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)

When this Operator is assigned to a Dormitory, restores +0.15 Morale per hour to all Operators assigned to that Dormitory, and every level of that Dormitory increases restoration by another +0.02 (Only the strongest stacked effect of this type takes place)
When this Operator is assigned to the Reception Room, if in Clue Exchange, increases Clue search speed by 30%
When this Operator is assigned to a Power Plant, increases the drone recovery rate by +10%
When this Operator is assigned to a Power Plant, increases the drone recovery rate by +15%

When this Operator is assigned to a Dormitory, increases own Morale restored per hour by +0.7; If there are other Operators in that Dormitory, further increases own Morale restored per hour by +0.05 for each additional Operator.
When this Operator is assigned to a Dormitory, restores +0.15 Morale per hour to all Operators assigned to that Dormitory (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)
When this Operator is assigned to a Dormitory, restores an additional +0.1 Morale to Operators assigned to that Dormitory whose Morale is below 20 (Strongest effect of the same type applies)
When this Operator is assigned to a Factory, Productivity +20% and Morale consumed per hour +0.25
When this Operator is assigned to a Factory, Productivity +30% and Morale consumed per hour +0.25
When this Operator is assigned to a Dormitory, restores +0.15 Morale per hour to all Operators assigned to that Dormitory (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)
When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, Passion +10; clue collection speed +5% (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)

When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center with Sakiko Togawa, Morale consumed per hour by Sakiko Togawa +0.05 and clue collection speed +5% (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)

When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, if an Operator is conducting Skill Specialization in the Training Room, that Operator's Specialization training speed +5% (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place).
When this Operator is assigned together with other L.G.D. Operators to the Control Center, all Factories' productivity +3% (Only the strongest effect of this type takes place)
When this Operator is assigned to a Trading Post, order acquisition efficiency +20%

When this Operator is assigned to a Trading Post, order acquisition efficiency +25%; for every facility in the Base with an Elite Operator assigned (excluding Assistants and Activity Rooms), order acquisition efficiency +2% (max 10 facilities)
